name: plot
description: Plot the recorded results from all Scope blocks in the simulation.

description: Remove a block (or list of blocks) from the simulation.

description: Remove a connection (or list of connections) from the simulation.

description: Remove an event (or list of events) from the simulation.

description: Reset all blocks to their initial state and the simulation time to zero (or to ``time`` if given).

description: Run the simulation for a given duration.

description: Finalize a chunked streaming run (logs FINISHED/INTERRUPTED). Call once

name: run_realtime
description: Run synchronized to wall-clock time with optional speed factor.

name: run_until
description: Advance up to `target_time` (a chunk boundary). `end_time` is the true

name: steadystate
description: Find the steady-state (DC operating point) of the system by root-finding on the residual rather than time integration.

name: stop
description: Signal a running simulation to stop cleanly at the next timestep boundary.

description: Drain the per-timestep wall-clock buffer and return the recorded
